text: Harness installed on cloud branch; commit harness/memory/memory.jsonl before session end or lessons are lost.

Removed 2 uncited hardware refs (Loihi/SpiNNaker) for IEEE compliance and scope; signposted existing Limitations paragraph; trimmed keywords 8->6. Citation integrity clean (23/23). papercheck submission: 2 errors -> 1 (only abstract length 274>200 remains).

Added Ethics statement: secondary analysis of de-identified data collected by Stony Brook Univ. Lab for Clinical Affective Neuroscience under its IRB; authors did no new collection. Mirrors DEAP handling. Clears papercheck ethics.statement flag. No IRB number fabricated.

CFP confirmed: IEEE BIBM 2026 Doctoral Forum is SINGLE-blind (author names required, no anonymized twin needed); 6-page limit EXCLUDING references and appendices; 1-page first-author CV appendix required. Set papercheck venue.blinding=single. Committed PDF: main=7pp incl refs, with_cv=8pp. CV appendix is real (A. Lane).
Tightened abstract 274->253 words, all 10 numeric tokens preserved. Remaining abstract.length flag is the tool's 200-word default; BIBM CFP sets no abstract limit, so it is non-blocking cosmetic.
